title: senecio lanatifolius
intro: Senecio lanatifolius, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and triterpenoids, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. Senecio lanatifolius is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
